arts.ttl: Who is Daniel Siebert, the referee for PSG - Girona in the Champions League today?
arts.sum: Germany’s Daniel Siebert will be today’s referee at the Parc des Princes, where French giants Paris Saint-Germain are to host tournament debutants Girona in the opening week of the revamped UEFA Champions League . PSG and Girona face off on matchday one of the Champions League’s new league phase, which has replaced the tournament’s group stage.
